name: obw-beer-tracker
description: Ohio Brew Week beer finder SPA (Preact) + build toolchain.

scripts.zip: npm run build && cd .. && rm -f obw-beer-tracker.zip && zip -rq obw-beer-tracker.zip obw-beer-tracker -x 'obw-beer-tracker/node_modules/*' 'obw-beer-tracker/.git/*' 'obw-beer-tracker/.gitignore' 'obw-beer-tracker/tests/*' 'obw-beer-tracker/*.log' && echo "Wrote $(pwd)/obw-beer-tracker.zip (upload this via WP admin)"
